message:
test(search-core): add 30 tests for filter compiler

Expand filter_compiler.rs from 25 to 55 tests covering:

Engine-independent (13 new):
- has_active_filters: individual field checks (project_id, thread_id,
  doc_kind, date_range), importance variants (high, normal, low)
- active_filter_count: single field counts (sender, project_id,
  thread_id, doc_kind, date_range, importance_urgent)

Tantivy integration (17 new):
- into_clauses: correct count, empty for default filter
- importance_low: no match in base data, match with low-importance doc
- Combined multi-filter: 3 filters, 4 filters with date range,
  all 6 filters with no match
- apply_to with filters wraps in BooleanQuery
- CompiledFilters Debug trait
- Non-existent sender returns empty
- Date range exact boundary (inclusive)
- Doc kind variants: message (2 hits), thread (no match),
  project (no match)
- compile_filters clause count for all 6 fields
- importance Any produces no clause
- date_range both-None produces no clause

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
